svg.title: Meridian - WAL Durability & Crash-Safe Write Path (ADR-007)

g.text: Meridian - WAL Durability & Crash-Safe Write Path (ADR-007)
ADR-007: WAL entry is written and flushed BEFORE the event reaches primary storage.
Crash at any point after WAL write → events recoverable on next startup.
At this point the event is
readers never see a partial file.
Either the old content or the
wal file list (sorted by creation time)
ensuring no data loss after crash.
